page.title: Tilecraft - Sliding Puzzle
page.description: A premium 8x8 sliding tile puzzle game.

header.tagline: Slide the words to solve the cosmos

nameModal.title: Welcome to Tilecraft
nameModal.instruction: Please enter your name to begin discovering the cosmos.

saveModal.title: Save Game
saveModal.instruction: Please enter a comment to save.

reshuffleConfirm.title: Restart Game?
reshuffleConfirm.message: You have highlighted groups. Reshuffling will restart the game and all selections will be lost.

messages.puzzleSolvedMessage: Stellar work! You solved the puzzle in {moves} moves.
messages.selectionRequiredMessage: You can not save unless you have at least one selection group.
